sweetie: Oh, honey, honey, tell them the story about your patient who thinks things are, like, other things. Y'know? Like, the phone rings and she takes a shower.
honey: That's pretty much it.
sweetie: Oops!
honey: But you tell it really well, sweetie.
sweetie: Thanks. Okay, now go away so we can talk about you.
honey: Okay. I'll miss you.
